one_time_description: TLE Ontario Land Claim Settlement received during the year; additionally a subsequent event notes a further $17,200,000 settlement negotiated after year-end
economic_notes: COVID-19 pandemic pay of $348,000 distributed to members (190 cheques at $2,000 and 1 at $4,000). Mining and exploration agreements with Pan American Silver Corp., Newmont Goldcorp, Elcora Resources, Imery's Resources, IAM Gold, MinKap Resources, GFG Resources, Probe Metals, Red Pine Exploration, Pancontinental Resources. Provincial Resource Revenue Sharing agreement. Subsequent event: $17,200,000 land claim settlement agreement negotiated after year-end, approved by members July 2020.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Province is Ontario. The $14,100,000 TLE Land Claim Settlement is a major one-time item inflating revenue and surplus. Subsequent event: additional $17,200,000 land claim settlement approved post year-end. COVID-19 pandemic pay of $348,000 paid to members. Consolidates Flying Post Holdings Inc., Flying Post Development General Partner Inc., and Flying Post Development Limited Partnership. Promissory notes of $346,020 from Ministry of Indian Affairs are interest-free and due March 31, 2021 or upon settlement of claim — classified as current liability. No schedule of remuneration for chief/council provided. OSR calculated as total revenue $20,551,165 minus total government transfers $808,120 = $19,743,045 (includes mining agreements, Casino Rama, TLE settlement, interest, and other non-government revenue).
